title: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#wktLiteral> not imported correctly
description:
Hi.
I am using the latest commit c010a63 and just trying to test the GeoSPARQL functionality. I imported an N-Triple file which contains among other triples the following one:
<http://geographica.di.uoa.gr/census/road/15503/geometry> <http://geographica.di.uoa.gr/cencus/ontology#asWKT> "LINESTRING(-73.729059 42.691196,-73.729115 42.691034)"^^<http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#wktLiteral> .
All geometries use the same #asWKT predicate shown above and all WKT literals are with no CRS.
In my http://localhost:8890/sparql/ I run the following query:
select *
where {
   ?s <http://geographica.di.uoa.gr/cencus/ontology#asWKT> ?wkt
}
limit 2

which yields the following results:
s 	wkt
http://geographica.di.uoa.gr/census/road/15503/geometry

"LINESTRING(-73.729059 42.691196,-73.729115 42.691034)"^^<http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry>

http://geographica.di.uoa.gr/census/road/157051/geometry

"LINESTRING(-73.579248 41.740456,-73.577922 41.740714,-73.577074 41.740899)"^^<http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry>

It looks to me that VSO during bulk loading converted the standard <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#wktLiteral>to its own internal type <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> which I am pretty sure it will cause exceptions if such as result would be used by a GeoSPARQL function.
Regards
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geometry_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY NOT NULL);
SELECT id, geom FROM geometry_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ST_AsText(geom) FROM geometry_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect import of wktLiteral during bulk loading
